form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth after showing early speed, behind Sparkling Sea at this track over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 23 at $101. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind You Are My Wish at this track over 1730m in a 3yo NR up to 50 on April 8 at $9. Looks the testing material.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait at the first attempt resulting in a false start being declared.
Galloped clear of interference after the start.

form.formComment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 8th (Sr1) over 1720m at Penrith beaten 19 m by Sentosar (2:05.50) in 2yo MAIDEN on July 17 at $9.50. Might be better for this run.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track was 6th-7.03 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Aurora Mighty Rob (2:03.00) in 3yo NR up to 58 on April 8 at $21. Before that, 8th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 45 m by Perfectdelight (2:02.30) in 3yo No NR F on March 28 at $10. Capable of a strong showing.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 7th-17.3 beaten 14 m by You Are My Wish (2:05.00) in 3yo NR up to 50 on April 8 at $26. form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 7th (Fr7) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle, beaten 25 m by Cocos Desire (1:51.60) in 3yo 0Ws/TS on April 7 at $21. At the start before was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 1609m at Newcastle was 7th-16.5 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Grumpyshannon (1:55.80) in 3yo NR up to 60 on March 28 at $2. Solid top-three contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to the lead passing the 1400m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr8) over 1730m at this track beaten 25 m by Aurora Mighty Rob (2:03.00) in 3yo NR up to 58 on April 8 at $23. Before that was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 28. Latest form makes this a pretty tough assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Check and broke gait near the 400m.

form.formComment: Last start by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (2:03.00) beating Red Bull Bernie in 3yo NR up to 58 on April 8 at $8 at the bell was 3rd-3.09. Great chance to win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by a nose after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (2:03.00) beating Red Bull Bernie in 3yo NR up to 58 on April 8 at $8 at the bell was 3rd-3.09. Great chance to win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 400m shifted out placing Talk To Lexy in restricted room.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of six months. Finished off last campaign recording a big 7 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at Parkes (2:02.30) beating Ideal Tao in NR up to 50 on October 24 at $1.40 at the bell was leading.8m on the pegs. Looks the testing material.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 1730m at this track was 7th-12.4 at the bell, beaten 10 m by Brooklyn Dan (2:01.00) in 3yo G2 No NR CG on March 28 at $71. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr6) over 1730m at this track was 6th-15.57 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Message Bank (2:02.20) in 3yo No NR CG on March 23 at $10. Capable of taking this out.
